meaning: adj.次要的,二级的,中级的,第二的
examples: She taught history at a secondary school.
Experience is what matters—age is of secondary importance.
Examinations are taken after about five years of secondary education.
"He wants Arsenal to do well and the international teams are secondary, " said Fabregas.
It called on the government to publish its plans for the secondary curriculum "as soon as possible".
